howItWorks.intro: This usd to jpy calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What is the current USD to JPY exchange rate?
faq.answer: This calculator uses an approximate rate of 154.50 JPY per USD. Actual rates fluctuate constantly on forex markets.

faq.question: Why is the Japanese yen so weak?
faq.answer: The yen has weakened due to interest rate differentials between the US Federal Reserve and the Bank of Japan, which has maintained ultra-low rates.
